Your Dream Event, Effortlessly Planned

• • •
Why Choose Us
Everything You Need, Beautifully Organized
From discovery to booking day, we handle the details so you can focus on what matters most

Smart Vendor Discovery

Find the perfect vendors based on your location, budget, and style preferences — with ratings and reviews you can trust

Curated Recommendations

Receive personalized vendor suggestions tailored to your event type, with detailed pricing and portfolio previews

Booking & Scheduling

Track appointments, schedule tastings and tours, and manage every vendor interaction in one elegant space

Location-Based Search

Find vendors near your venue with distance filtering, ensuring convenience for you and your guests

Private Notes & Contacts

Keep detailed notes on every vendor conversation, track follow-ups, and never lose an important detail

Planning Checklist

Stay on track with a curated timeline of tasks — from venue tours to final headcount, nothing gets overlooked

Your Journey
Four Simple Steps to Your Perfect Day
01

Share Your Vision

Tell us your event type, location, date, guest count, and budget

02

Discover Vendors

We curate the best-rated vendors near your venue, matched to your style

03

Compare & Connect

Review portfolios, read reviews, and save your favorites all in one place

04

Book with Confidence

Schedule appointments, track bookings, and manage every detail through your big day

Pricing
Invest in Your Perfect Event
Transparent pricing with no hidden fees

Essentials

$5
  • ✓ Create 1 event
  • ✓ Search up to 20 vendors
  • ✓ Basic vendor profiles
  • ✓ Email support
Most Popular

Professional

$29
  • ✓ Unlimited vendor search
  • ✓ Curated recommendations
  • ✓ Contact notes & scheduling
  • ✓ Budget tracking
  • ✓ Priority support
  • ✓ Export reports

Premier

$99
  • ✓ Everything in Professional
  • ✓ Unlimited events
  • ✓ Vendor communication tools
  • ✓ Guest list management
  • ✓ Document storage
  • ✓ VIP concierge support
